data.description:
## Why
Existing review operations should become the first workflows without breaking their public API,
proving the engine end-to-end and removing the contradictory Langflow REST stub.

## What
- Characterization/golden-master tests on the public surface FIRST; reframe review_ticket /
  review_code / scan_spec as built-in workflows via forwarding shims; parallel-run-and-diff
  before cutover.
- Ship an end-to-end code_review example (scripted -> agent -> gate(unsecured) -> comment).
- Retire the LangflowRunner REST stub.

## Scope
- In: built-in workflows + migration safety.
- Out: new public APIs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Characterization tests freeze lib/CLI/MCP behavior before refactor.
- [ ] review_ticket/review_code/scan_spec reframed as workflows; public API preserved via shims.
- [ ] code_review example workflow snapshot-tested; LangflowRunner removed.
data.title: WS-K: Built-in example workflows (strangler-fig; retire LangflowRunner)
